meta.ogDescription: NEON is a collective defending electronic music culture as a space for human connection, inclusion, and community. The dancefloor is an idea, not a location.
meta.eventDetailDescription: Community-funded gathering. Choose your contribution level to register — shared costs, not profit.

donationPicker.successMessage: Thank you for your contribution. You are part of the evolution.

manageDonation.title: Manage your yearly donation
manageDonation.description: Enter the email address you used when donating to manage or cancel your recurring contribution.
manageDonation.emailSent: Check your inbox — we sent you a secure link to manage your donation.
manageDonation.notFound: No active donation found for this email address.

events.indexSubtitle: Upcoming events. Sign in to see invite-only events you are on.
events.missingStripeKey: Payments are not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY (Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys, publishable key, same account as your backend) to apps/web/.env.local and restart Next.js.
events.contributionSubtitle: Events are funded by the community. Pick the level that covers your share of costs.
events.promoInvalid: This solidarity code is not valid for your selection.
events.checkoutEnterContact: Enter your email or phone to continue.
events.checkoutOnePersonHint: One registration per person — so we can plan fairly for everyone.
events.allTiersSoldOut: All contribution levels are currently full.
events.checkoutConfirmTimeout: Registration is taking longer than expected. Refresh the page in a moment.
events.checkoutConfirmError: Could not confirm your registration. Refresh the page or try again.
events.intentError: Could not start registration. Please try again.
events.costTransparencyBullet3: Shared operations — we aim to break even, not profit
events.costTransparencyDisclaimer: Contributions cover shared event costs — not profit.
events.contactPrivacyHint: We use this for your registration and event updates — not for marketing.
events.confirmingNextSteps: You will see your confirmation here shortly.
events.supportNeonBeyondEvent: Want to support NEON beyond this event?
events.inviteOnlyEmptyBody: This event is curated and invite-only. Sign in with the email or phone on the guest list, or use the link from your host.
events.inviteOnlySignInCta: Sign in with your invite contact
events.registrationConfirmedBodyNoTier: Your place for this event is confirmed.
events.hostInviteConversionsEmpty: No one has registered with this link yet.
events.needInvite: Invite-only. Sign in below with the email or phone on the guest list, or use your host's link.
events.sessionIntro: Already registered? Sign in with email or phone.
events.sessionCodeSentEmail: Code in your email (or open the link).
events.sessionCodeSentSms: Code in your texts (or open the link).
events.privateMissingSlug: Add ?slug=… to the address, or open the link from your message or the events list.
events.profileModalSubtitle: Name and verified email or phone to access invite-only events.
events.profileManageSubtitle: Update your name and contact details.
events.profileContactHint: Provide at least an email or a mobile number. We will send a short code to verify.
events.profileVerifyEmailHint: Enter the code we sent to your email.
events.profileVerifyPhoneHint: Enter the code we sent by text message.
events.profileErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
